question: How many days per week can employees work remotely?
answer: 9 [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0010::i0000::2f11ad6d4db3]. Staff Attendance and Office Presence All employees are expected to maintain a minimum of 5 days per week in-office presence, effective from 1 February 2025 [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0010::i0000::2f11ad6d4db3]. This supersedes the remote work provisions in Section 2 of the handbook [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0010::i0000::2f11ad6d4db3]. question: What encryption requirements apply to sensitive data?
answer: 8 [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0009::i0000::183a741f2188]. Encryption Standards Update Encryption of sensitive data at rest is mandatory for all CONFIDENTIAL and RESTRICTED data, using AES-256 or equivalent approved algorithms [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0009::i0000::183a741f2188]. This supersedes the more general encryption requirements in the handbook [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0009::i0000::183a741f2188]. Data in transit must be protected using TLS 1.3 or higher [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0009::i0000::183a741f2188].

question: Are employees allowed to use personal devices for work?
answer: 13 [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0014::i0000::22101d8d9bb7]. BYOD enrolment requires completion of the BYOD Agreement Form (IT-012) and device registration with IT Security [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0014::i0000::22101d8d9bb7]. All BYOD devices must be enrolled in the company Mobile Device Management (MDM) solution [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0014::i0000::22101d8d9bb7].

question: What travel insurance does the company provide?
answer: 14 [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0015::i0000::6df99b46d995]. question: Can part-time employees work remotely?

question: What is the minimum password length?
answer: 2 [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0000::d2a928aa94b0]. Enhanced Password Requirements Following a recent security audit, the following enhanced password requirements supersede Section 4 of the Internal Policy Handbook [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0000::d2a928aa94b0]. All passwords must now be a minimum of 12 characters in length (increased from 8 characters) [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0000::d2a928aa94b0]. Password rotation period is reduced to 30 days for all users (previously 90 days) [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0000::d2a928aa94b0]. Privileged accounts must rotate passwords every 14 days [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0000::d2a928aa94b0].

answer: CONFIDENTIAL data may only be accessed (not downloaded) through the secure container [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0014::i0003::c79e6cb648ff]. question: What happens if an employee breaches the data security policy?
answer: Personal apps cannot access data within the secure container [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0014::i0002::051345293182]. The company reserves the right to remotely wipe the secure container if the device is lost, stolen, or if the employee leaves the company [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0014::i0002::051345293182]. Personal data outside the container is not affected [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0014::i0002::051345293182]. BYOD devices must not be used to store RESTRICTED data under any circumstances [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0014::i0002::051345293182].

question: What classification levels exist for company data?
answer: 3 [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0004::i0000::11385c4051c6]. Data Security and Classification Policy All company data must be classified according to the four-tier classification scheme: PUBLIC, INTERNAL, CONFIDENTIAL, and RESTRICTED [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0004::i0000::11385c4051c6]. Data owners are responsible for assigning the correct classification level upon creation [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0004::i0000::11385c4051c6]. question: What is the clean desk policy?
answer: Visitors must never be left unattended in any area [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0010::i0002::ce27530db5f5]. Visitor badges must be returned upon departure [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0010::i0002::ce27530db5f5]. Visitors are never permitted in Restricted Zones (server rooms, data centres, security operations centre) under any circumstances, regardless of the visitor's seniority or purpose of visit [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0010::i0002::ce27530db5f5]. Clean desk policy is mandatory in all open-plan areas [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0010::i0002::ce27530db5f5].

question: Can employees install personal software on work devices?
answer: 8 [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0009::i0000::40d044dc00be]. Acceptable Use of IT Resources Company IT resources, including email, internet, software, and hardware, are provided for business purposes [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0009::i0000::40d044dc00be]. Limited personal use is permitted provided it does not interfere with work duties, consume excessive bandwidth, or create security risks [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0009::i0000::40d044dc00be]. question: What multi-factor authentication methods are approved?
answer: Common passwords, dictionary words, and passwords containing the user's name or employee ID are blocked by the password policy engine [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0005::i0002::15202f861778]. Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is mandatory for all remote access, VPN connections, and access to CONFIDENTIAL or RESTRICTED systems [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0005::i0002::15202f861778]. MFA tokens must be registered with IT Security before first use [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0005::i0002::15202f861778].

question: How frequently should security awareness training be completed?
answer: 7 [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0008::i0000::d1d53fadf698]. Training and Awareness Requirements All employees must complete mandatory security awareness training annually [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0008::i0000::d1d53fadf698]. New starters must complete the training within 30 days of joining [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0008::i0000::d1d53fadf698]. The training covers phishing recognition, data handling, password hygiene, and incident reporting [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0008::i0000::d1d53fadf698]. Department heads are responsible for ensuring 100% completion rates within their teams [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0008::i0000::d1d53fadf698].

question: What remote work equipment does the company provide?
answer: The company reserves the right to revoke remote work privileges with 5 working days notice if performance targets are not met or if security requirements are breached [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0003::i0003::4ac9f6f1cedd]. Remote workers are responsible for ensuring their home workspace meets health and safety requirements as outlined in the DSE (Display Screen Equipment) assessment policy [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0003::i0003::4ac9f6f1cedd]. The company will provide ergonomic equipment upon request [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0003::i0003::4ac9f6f1cedd].

question: Is manager approval required before sharing data externally?
answer: 7 [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0008::i0000::62b34b482a0a]. Data Sharing Approval Process For operational efficiency, sharing of INTERNAL-classified data with approved external partners does not require manager approval, superseding the general requirement in Section 3 of the handbook [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0008::i0000::62b34b482a0a]. A list of approved external partners is maintained by the Procurement team and published on the company intranet [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0008::i0000::62b34b482a0a].

question: What is the incident response procedure for cyber attacks?
answer: 6 [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0007::i0000::4318c9582a70]. Incident Response and Data Breach Procedures All suspected security incidents must be reported to the Security Operations Centre (SOC) within 1 hour of discovery via email (soc@company.com) or the incident hotline (ext [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0007::i0000::4318c9582a70]. 9999) [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0007::i0000::4318c9582a70]. Failure to report promptly is itself a policy violation [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0007::i0000::4318c9582a70].

question: What is the policy on social media use during work?
answer: Customer and partner notifications follow the Communication Protocol (BCP-003), which specifies templates, approval chains, and timing requirements for different incident categories [CITATION: business_continuity_plan::p0004::i0002::ed7e403ae057]. Social media monitoring is intensified during crisis events [CITATION: business_continuity_plan::p0004::i0002::ed7e403ae057]. The Communications team monitors all major platforms and responds to queries/misinformation in accordance with the approved messaging framework [CITATION: business_continuity_plan::p0004::i0002::ed7e403ae057].

question: How should confidential documents be disposed of?
answer: At the end of each working day, employees must: clear all documents from desks, lock filing cabinets, lock computer screens, and secure any removable media in locked storage [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0010::i0003::43c21606f16d]. Sensitive documents must be disposed of using cross-cut shredders provided on each floor [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0010::i0003::43c21606f16d]. Regular waste bins must not be used for any documents containing company data [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0010::i0003::43c21606f16d]. question: What is the maximum number of failed login attempts before lockout?
answer: Automated rotation is enforced through the Identity Management platform [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0001::327dc7c43423]. Passphrases are now accepted and encouraged as an alternative to traditional passwords [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0001::327dc7c43423]. A passphrase must contain at least 4 words and a minimum of 20 characters [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0001::327dc7c43423]. The first character of each word must be capitalised [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0001::327dc7c43423]. Failed login threshold is reduced to 3 attempts (from 5), after which the account is locked for 60 minutes [CITATION: it_security_addendum_2025::p0003::i0001::327dc7c43423].

question: Who should be notified in case of a suspected data breach?
answer: In the event of a personal data breach, the Data Protection Officer (DPO) must be notified immediately [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0007::i0003::03fcb10e88c0]. The DPO will determine whether notification to the ICO (Information Commissioner's Office) is required within the statutory 72-hour window [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0007::i0003::03fcb10e88c0]. All employees must cooperate fully with incident investigations [CITATION: internal_policy_handbook_v2::p0007::i0003::03fcb10e88c0].
